---
title: "R Notebook"
output:
  html_notebook: default
  pdf_document: default
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(reshape)
library(ggplot2)
library(nlme)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotrix)
library(emmeans)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r}
metadata <- read.csv(file = "GH_2018_metadata_V4.csv", header = T)
#Added a Total_veg column to account to total biomass without tubers. 

metadata$Total = as.numeric(metadata$Total)
metadata$Roots = as.numeric(metadata$Roots)
metadata1 <- subset(metadata, Shoots >= 0 & Roots >= 0)
```


#Approach 1: Cross sectional analysis of biomass for each generation: 

##Tubers

Defining functions for analysis b/c its gonna get repetitive: 
```{r}
metadata_tuber <- subset(metadata, Tuber_Mass != "NA")

#Iteration 1 (No conditioning): 
metadata_tuber1 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 1)
lm_tuber1 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber1)
summary(lm_tuber1)
anova(lm_tuber1)

```

```{r}
plot_tuber1 = emmip(lm_tuber1, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber1

df_tuber1 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber1$data)
```



```{r}
#Iteration 3: 
metadata_tuber3 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 3)
lm_tuber3 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber3)
summary(lm_tuber3)
anova(lm_tuber3)

contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber3, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber3 = emmip(lm_tuber3, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber3

df_tuber3 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber3$data)

```



```{r}
#Iteration 5:
metadata_tuber5 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 5)
lm_tuber5 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber5)
summary(lm_tuber5)
anova(lm_tuber5)
```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber5, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber5 = emmip(lm_tuber5, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber5

df_tuber5 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber5$data)

```


```{r}
plot_grid(plot_tuber1,plot_tuber3,plot_tuber5, nrow = 1, labels=c('D','E','F'))
```

***

##Shoots/Vegatative biomass

```{r}
metadata_Shoots1 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 1)
lm_shoots1 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots1)
summary(lm_shoots1)
anova(lm_shoots1)
```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots1, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i1 = emmip(lm_shoots1, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i1
df_shoots_i1 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i1$data)
```



```{r}
#Iteration 3

metadata_Shoots3 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 3)
lm_shoots3 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots3)
summary(lm_shoots3)
anova(lm_shoots3)

```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots3, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i3 = emmip(lm_shoots3, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i3
df_shoots_i3 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i3$data)
```



```{r}
#Iteration 5
metadata_Shoots5 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 5)
lm_shoots5 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots5)
summary(lm_shoots5)
anova(lm_shoots5)
```

```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots5, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i5 = emmip(lm_shoots5, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i5
df_shoots_i5 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i5$data)
```

***


```{r}
df_shoots_i1 = mutate(df_shoots_i1, Iteration = 1)
df_shoots_i3 = mutate(df_shoots_i3, Iteration = 3)
df_shoots_i5 = mutate(df_shoots_i5, Iteration = 5)

df_shoots_PLOT = rbind(df_shoots_i1,df_shoots_i3, df_shoots_i5)
df_shoots_PLOT$Iteration = as.factor(df_shoots_PLOT$Iteration)

```


```{r}
df_shoots_A = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "A")

plot_Andigenum  = ggplot(df_shoots_A, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Andigenum
```

```{r}
df_shoots_C = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "C")

plot_Chiletanum  = ggplot(df_shoots_C, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Chiletanum
```


```{r}
df_shoots_NA = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "M")

plot_NorAm  = ggplot(df_shoots_NA, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_NorAm
```


#Figure 7 Pt1
```{r}
library(cowplot)
plot_grid(plot_Andigenum,plot_Chiletanum,plot_NorAm, labels=c('A','B','C'), nrow = 1)
```


***

Now let's try with Tubermass: 

```{r}
df_tuber1 = mutate(df_tuber1, Iteration = 1)
df_tuber3 = mutate(df_tuber3, Iteration = 3)
df_tuber5 = mutate(df_tuber5, Iteration = 5)

df_tubers_PLOT = rbind(df_tuber1,df_tuber3, df_tuber5)
df_tubers_PLOT$Iteration = as.factor(df_tubers_PLOT$Iteration)
```


```{r}
df_tubers_A = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "A")

plot_tubers_Andigenum  = ggplot(df_tubers_A, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_Andigenum
```


```{r}
df_tubers_C = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "C")

plot_tubers_Chiletanum  = ggplot(df_tubers_C, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_Chiletanum
```

```{r}
df_tubers_NA = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "M")

plot_tubers_NorAm  = ggplot(df_tubers_NA, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_NorAm
```

#Figure 7 Pt2: 

```{r}
library(cowplot)
plot_grid(plot_tubers_Andigenum,plot_tubers_Chiletanum,plot_tubers_NorAm, labels=c('D','E','F'), nrow = 1)
```
